data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Deposit hold/capture integration', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this integration. The linked use case mentions the need for deposit hold/capture integration, but the prior steps do not demonstrate any API interactions or state checks that would validate this requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the required functionality.
gaps: Lack of evidence for deposit hold/capture integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
